# foundry_marking_membership (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry MarkingMembership.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "foundry_marking_membership" "example" {
  marking_id = "example-marking-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `marking_id` (String) ID of the Marking. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `marking_members` (Set of String) List of the IDs of the members (Users or Groups) of this Marking.
